tagline: A craft bakery and cafe in Santa Rosa's Railroad Square
seoDescription: Marla is chef Amy Brown's craft bakery and cafe in Santa Rosa's historic Railroad Square: artisan breads, croissants, pastry, and seasonal cafe fare from locally farmed ingredients.
heroSubheading: Artisan breads, croissants, and pastry made from locally farmed, seasonal ingredients by chef Amy Brown.
highlights: Chef Amy Brown, formerly of Nopa
aboutBody: Marla is the craft bakery and cafe of chef-owner Amy Brown, who spent two decades as a bread baker and pastry chef, most recently running the pastry program at San Francisco's acclaimed Nopa, before opening Marla with her husband and partner Joe Wolf. The name is an acronym of the family members who taught them to cook and bake.

Now in Santa Rosa's historic Railroad Square, Marla's breads, pastries, cookies, tarts, cakes, and croissants reflect that experience and the abundance of where they live, with menus driven by each season and locally grown organic produce, flours, eggs, and butter.

services.title: Artisan Breads
services.description: Naturally leavened loaves and baguettes baked fresh, the foundation of the bakery.

services.title: Croissants & Pastry
services.description: Laminated croissants and morning pastry made from scratch, a Sonoma County favorite.

services.title: Cookies, Tarts & Cakes
services.description: Seasonal cookies, tarts, and special-occasion cakes from the pastry kitchen.

services.title: Cafe & Catering
services.description: A seasonal cafe menu and catering built on locally farmed ingredients.

notes: Web-verified and authored for the ADA accessibility batch 2 (owner/history, services, awards confirmed from the business site + Yelp/Tripadvisor/press). confirmed:true.
